description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular black briefcase with a soft, padded exterior and a sleek, modern design. It features two short, rounded handles on the top, made from the same material as the body, and a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap with metal hardware. The main compartment is accessed via a zipper that runs along the top and partially down the sides, providing wide access to the interior. The surface appears to be made of synthetic leather or nylon, giving it a slightly matte finish with subtle stitching details for reinforcement. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist, professional look. The briefcase is designed to carry documents, laptops, and other personal items, making it suitable for business or urban commuting.
description: A sleek, black padded briefcase with top handles, a detachable shoulder strap, and a zipper closure, designed for professional urban use.
description_view_0: The back of the briefcase is visible, showing a smooth, padded surface with horizontal stitching and both top handles clearly seen.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the thickness of the briefcase, the zipper running along the edge, and the attachment point of the shoulder strap.
description_view_2: The front of the briefcase is shown, featuring a clean, unadorned surface with both handles and the shoulder strap visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, focusing on the zipper track and the robust, adjustable shoulder strap attachment.
attribute_handle_type: Two short, rounded, fixed handles made of padded synthetic leather attached with reinforced stitching, plus one adjustable, flexible shoulder strap with metal hardware.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top and sides; no visible lock mechanism.
